core_concept: Times of Day and Simple Sequences
facts: Morning always comes before afternoon because we eat breakfast in the morning and then lunch in the afternoon.
Evening comes after afternoon and before night; we say 'good evening' when the sun starts going down, and 'good night' when we go to sleep.
Today is the day we are in right now; yesterday was the day before today, and tomorrow will be the day after today.
misconceptions: A preschooler may think that 'yesterday' and 'tomorrow' mean the same thing because both are not today, so they might say 'I went to the park tomorrow' meaning yesterday.
